title: Complete a successful analysis and view classification and confidence
description: Verifies a user can upload a supported media file, observe an in-progress state, and then see a classification and confidence result.

steps.description: Navigate to /analyze
Click the file upload area
Select a supported media file from the device
Verify a loading or analyzing status is displayed
Verify an analysis result is displayed with a classification and a confidence value

title: Use primary CTA from Home to reach Analyze ready to upload
description: Verifies a visitor can land on the home page, understand there is an analysis entry point, and navigate via the primary CTA to the Analyze page where an upload control is available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call-to-action to start analysis
Verify the user lands on the Analyze page
Verify a file upload area is available

title: Trust-building journey from About to Analyze to run a test upload
description: Verifies a visitor can read About content and then navigate to Analyze to submit a supported file and receive results.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Click the navigation option to view the Analyze page
Click the file upload area
Select a supported media file from the device
Verify an analysis result is displayed with a classification and a confidence value

title: Move between Home, About, and Analyze via header navigation reliably
description: Verifies the top-level navigation allows moving between Home, About, and Analyze without getting stuck or losing basic page functionality.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation option to view the About page
Click the navigation option to view the Analyze page
Click the navigation option to return to the Home page
Verify the user lands on the Home page
Verify the product overview content is displayed

title: Deep-link directly to Analyze and start an upload
description: Verifies a visitor can enter the app directly on the Analyze page and use the upload control without first visiting Home.

steps.description: Navigate to /analyze
Verify a file upload area is available
Click the file upload area
Select a supported media file from the device
Verify an analysis result is displayed

title: Navigate from Home to About to read product context
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the home page to the About page and view mission and performance callouts.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation option to view the About page
Verify the About page content is displayed
Verify mission and performance/accuracy information is present

title: Read mission and performance statistics on About page
description: Verifies the About page renders the project mission and performance statistics so a visitor can evaluate claims.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Verify the mission statement content is displayed
Verify accuracy or performance statistics are displayed

title: Replace a selected file by choosing a different supported file
description: Verifies a user can change their selected media by choosing a new file and receive a result for the latest selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /analyze
Click the file upload area
Select a supported media file from the device
Click the file upload area again
Select a different supported media file from the device
Verify an analysis result is displayed with a classification and a confidence value
Verify only one set of current results is displayed for the latest analysis

title: Reject unsupported file type with clear validation and allow retry
description: Verifies uploading an unsupported file type shows a validation error and the user can try selecting another file.

steps.description: Navigate to /analyze
Click the file upload area
Select an unsupported file type from the device
Verify an unsupported file type validation error is visible
Click the file upload area
Select a supported media file from the device
Verify an analysis result is displayed
